{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the core issue of overclaiming and structural drift, names the load-bearing concept (the deployment gap), and proposes a reframing that aligns with prior work on constrained reinforcement learning.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks through the argument chain, flagging multiple inconsistencies such as the misframed observations, overclaiming, and internal contradictions, and provides specific fixes for each issue.",
    "R1.4": "The agent contrasts the current work with prior literature on constrained reinforcement learning robustness and safe RL, though it could provide more specific references to 3-5 nearest works.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty around points that may be resolved in other sections of the paper (e.g., Methods or Results) and suggests back-referencing if necessary.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within the requested scope, addressing all key issues without drifting into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors and identifies potential harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaiming and misframing of observations.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides clear annotations for major changes and recommendations, though minor edits are not always traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core issue of overclaiming and structural drift, names the load-bearing concept (the deployment gap), and proposes a reframing that aligns with prior work on constrained reinforcement learning.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks through the argument chain, flagging multiple inconsistencies such as the misframed observations, overclaiming, and internal contradictions, and provides specific fixes for each issue.
rationale.R1.4: The agent contrasts the current work with prior literature on constrained reinforcement learning robustness and safe RL, though it could provide more specific references to 3-5 nearest works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty around points that may be resolved in other sections of the paper (e.g., Methods or Results) and suggests back-referencing if necessary.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within the requested scope, addressing all key issues without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors and identifies potential harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaiming and misframing of observations.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides clear annotations for major changes and recommendations, though minor edits are not always traced.
